Local data refresh
Open the Streamlit dashboard or copy the CLI command to fetch fresh data.
This standalone file is browser-only. It cannot run Python, call yfinance/SEC, or write parquet files. Real refreshes run from Streamlit or the command line, then regenerate this static HTML.
Email subject
Browser-only export. Downloads an .eml draft with blank recipients, newsletter HTML/text, and the current static dashboard HTML attached. PNG snapshots are produced by the Streamlit/CLI exporter.
